cover.era_chip: 高麗 · 經濟·土地·身分
cover.subtitle:
전시과·해동통보·신분제,
고려 사회의 세 축.
cover.imagePrompt: 12th century Goryeo dynasty composite illustration. Foreground: a Goryeo court official with a land registry scroll. Middle: a coin (haedong tongbo) and silver bottle (eunbyeong) on a low wooden table. Background: tiered rice paddies and a small village of thatch-roof houses. Color: jade-green + harvest gold + earth-brown. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO READABLE SCROLLS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 경종 시정 전시과. 토지 제도 정립.

outro.tip_headline:
"전시과(토지) · 해동통보(화폐) · 음서(신분)"
세 축을 묶을 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험은 전시과 5단계 변천, 화폐 종류(건원·해동·은병), 신분제(귀족·중류·양민·천민)와 향·소·부곡, 음서 제도를 종합적으로 묶어 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: three small icons arranged in a triangle — a land map, a coin, a tiered figure suggesting class hierarchy. Jade-green + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
